name: appveyor
description: AppVeyor CI/CD commands — check builds, deploy, manage projects from any repo

interface.shortDescription: 8 AppVeyor skills for build status, deployments, and team management
interface.longDescription: CLI-based plugin for AppVeyor CI/CD. Check build status, view history, start builds, deploy, manage users/roles — from any repo. Uses the appveyor CLI binary with --json for structured output.
